Fields.Name: Disable Param - Network Test
Fields.Description: Parameters marked with  are excluded in the NT version package.

Fields.Name: Open - Event Flag ID
Fields.Description: Event flag ID of open condition

Fields.Name: Open - Traversal Area - X Min
Fields.Description: Coordinates of the traversal area that expands when opened (Xmin)

Fields.Name: Open - Traversal Area - X Max
Fields.Description: Coordinates of the traversal area that expands when opened (Xmax)

Fields.Name: Open - Traversal Area - Y Min
Fields.Description: Coordinates of the traversal area that expands when opened (Ymin)

Fields.Name: Open - Traversal Area - Y Max
Fields.Description: Coordinates of the traversal area that expands when opened (Ymax)

Fields.Name: Acquisition - Event Flag ID
Fields.Description: Event flag ID of the acquisition production start condition. Assuming that only one of the map fragments is On

Fields.Name: Acquisition - Display Scale
Fields.Description: Display magnification at the time of acquisition production

Fields.Name: Acquisition - Center X Coordinate
Fields.Description: Center coordinates (X) at the time of acquisition production

Fields.Name: Acquisition - Center Y Coordinate
Fields.Description: For the central seat at the time of acquisition production (Y)

Fields.Name: Acquisition - Display Resource Scale
Fields.Description: Display magnification of blindfold resources for acquisition production

Fields.Name: Acquisition - Resource Offset X
Fields.Description: Display position offset (X) of blindfold resource for acquisition production

Fields.Name: Acquisition - Resource Offset Y
Fields.Description: Offset of display position of blindfold resource for acquisition production (Y)
